rationale: The citing paper’s stated methodological lineage centers on durable-goods loyalty/last-move models (e.g., Colombo & Morrison; Schmertmann), while the cited paper is a structural state-dependent demand and pricing-conduct study in packaged goods, suggesting weak direct methodological overlap. However, the matched evidence is only a bare DOI reference entry (no citation context, no reference text/title), so we cannot confirm whether it is merely incidental or used as a conceptual source on state dependence. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to confidently drop.
